---
date: "2026-06-08T12:00:00+00:00"
draft: false
image: img/portfolio/banc/12_data_and_code.png
showonlyimage: false
title: code - nat.ggplot
weight: 6
bibliography: asb.bib
---

[![Zenodo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Zenodo-10.5281%2Fzenodo.20350565-1f4d2b)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350565)

<!--more-->

A [natverse](https://natverse.org) **R** package for publication-quality 2D ggplot2 renderings of neurons and brain meshes; the rendering backend behind most 2D neuron panels in the BANC figures.

**Source:** [natverse/nat.ggplot](https://github.com/natverse/nat.ggplot).  **Archive:** Zenodo, [10.5281/zenodo.20350565](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350565).

**Cite as:** Bates et al., 2026: nat.ggplot (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20350565).
